info.name: Agent Platform Backend API
info.description:
GraphQL API collection for the VMware AI Agent Platform backend.

**Endpoint:** `POST http://localhost:8080/query`

**Auth options:**
1. Bearer token in `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header (returned from the `login` mutation — simplest in Postman).
2. Session cookie `ap_session` (set automatically by browser when posting from same origin).

**Required headers (every POST to /query):**
- `Content-Type: application/json`
- `Origin: http://localhost:8080` — required by the CSRF middleware (Origin or Referer must be present, and must be same-origin or allowlisted).

**CORS allowlist headers (also valid):**
- `Authorization` (Bearer)
- `X-Environment`

**Source of truth:** GraphQL schema at `/schema/*.graphql`. Generated from `internal/graph/testdata/client_operations/*.graphql` (these are the operations the front-end actually runs).

**Authorization model (3 roles, post #56 refactor):**
- `admin` — full access to every operation (only role that can write)
- `read_only` — read-only access to most business objects (agents list, virtual keys list, dashboard, audit, metering); cannot mutate anything
- `user` — owner-scoped access to their own agents/keys; unchanged

**Default admin (dev):** username `admin@platform.local`, password `ChangeMe123!` (forces password change on first login unless `ADMIN_BOOTSTRAP_PASSWORD` env var is set).

request.description: Authenticate with email (or username) + password. Returns a bearer token; **store it in `session_token` collection variable for subsequent requests**. If `mustChangePassword=true`, the user must call `changePassword` before any other mutation succeeds (queries still work).
Current authenticated user. Useful to verify the bearer token is still valid (e.g. after a page refresh) and to re-check `mustChangePassword`.

Change own password. Returns `Boolean!`. Clears `mustChangePassword`, revokes all other sessions, and re-issues a fresh session cookie. The bearer token continues to work for this session. Whitelisted from the `mustChangePassword` middleware (always allowed).
Invalidate the current session. Returns `Boolean!`. Whitelisted from the `mustChangePassword` middleware (always allowed).
Console overview page — stat cards, recent agents, system notices. Restricted to `admin` / `read_only`.
Paginated/filtered/sorted user list. Restricted to `admin` only.
Debounced dedupe check for the create-user form. Returns `Boolean!`. Restricted to `admin` only.
List all users assigned to a given role id. Restricted to `admin` only.

Create a user. `passwordMode = AUTO` generates a temp password returned once in `generatedPassword` and forces `mustChangePassword=true`. `CUSTOM` uses `customPassword` and does not force a password change.
Update a user. All fields optional. Note: `displayName` is accepted but currently has no backing column (ignored by backend).
Delete a user. Returns `DeleteUserPayload { id }`.
Reset a user's password — backend generates a new 16-char temp password, sets `mustChangePassword=true`, revokes all sessions. The new password is returned **once** in `generatedPassword`.
Toggle `enabled` on a user.
Replace the user set on a custom role. Returns the role and the number of users assigned.
List built-in and custom roles. Restricted to `admin` only.
Fetch a single role by id. Null if not found.
List custom (non-built-in) roles. Restricted to `admin` only.
List all permission keys (drives the role-permission matrix UI). Admin-only.
Create a custom role (initially with no permissions). Restricted to `admin` only.
Delete a custom role.
Replace the role's permission set wholesale (matrix row).
Upsert a permission key. Admin-only.
List custom roles assigned to a user. Admin-only.
Assign a single custom role to a user. Restricted to `admin` only.
Remove a single custom role from a user.
List departments. Restricted to `admin` only.
Create a department + its litellm team. Rolls back on sync failure (no orphan team).
Delete a department.
List memberships for a department. In-resolver delegation allows platform/tenant admins or the department's own dept-admin.
Add a user to a department with a membership role (`user` or `dept_admin`). Delegated to platform/tenant admins or dept-admins.
Remove a user from a department.
Get platform-wide settings (currently just `agentUser` — the OS account installed agents run as). Admin-only.
Update platform settings. `agentUser` must be non-empty. Admin-only.
Paginated/filtered/sorted list of vCenter resource pools. Admin-only.
Fetch a single resource pool. Null if not found. Admin-only.

Create a resource pool. Credentials are written to secret store — only the ref is persisted; the plaintext never reaches the DB. Set `insecure: true` to skip vCenter TLS verification (self-signed/internal CA).
Update a resource pool. All fields optional. Use to rotate credentials.
Delete a resource pool. Returns `DeleteResourcePoolPayload { id, deletedName }`.
Connect → fetch inventory tree (per-DC clusters/hosts/RPs + datastores/networks/vm folders/storage policies) → persist. Long-running — may take seconds.
Pre-save reachability probe (no credentials) — used by the 接入表单 to validate the endpoint before committing.
List vCenter placement resource pools for a platform pool. Powers the deploy form's placement picker (`targetResourcePool`). Admin-only.
Paginated model gateways + sync summary. Admin-only.
Get only the gateway-sync summary.

Create a model gateway. The litellm master key is written to secret store — only the ref is stored. loadBalancingStrategy, backendModelCount, and lastSyncStatus are read-only, populated by the post-create background sync (and subsequent periodic sync). A row in just-created state will show lastSyncStatus=SYNCED within a few seconds.
Update a model's name/endpoint and (on re-submit) rotate the master key. backendModelCount and loadBalancingStrategy are NOT inputs — they're read-only, populated by sync.
Delete a model gateway. Returns `DeleteModelGatewayPayload { deletedID }`.

Sync the live litellm gateway now: pings /models for connectivity, fetches the global routing strategy from /config/router, and counts the gateway's deployed models from /models. On success, gateway.loadBalancingStrategy and gateway.backendModelCount are persisted; on failure the stored values are preserved (transient outage ≠ reset).

Pre-create dry-run probe. The form-level Test Connection button on the create form uses this — pings a not-yet-saved config. No row is created; the result's `gateway` field is null. Only the connectivity probe runs (no routing-strategy probe).
Raw gateway connections (admin-only). For console UI prefer `modelGateways`.
Register a raw gateway connection. `masterKey` is written to secret store — only the ref is persisted. Setting `isDefault=true` clears the flag on any other.
Ping a gateway connection. Returns `GatewayStatus` (connected / disconnected / error).
Delete a gateway connection.
List model routes. Admin-only.
Create a model route (console 创建路由 page). `modelAlias` defaults to `name` when omitted.
Edit a model route (console 编辑路由 page). All fields optional.
Toggle a model route's enabled flag.
Delete a model route.
Legacy name-keyed upsert of a model route (the console 创建路由 page uses `createModelRoute` instead). Admin-only.
List upstreams. Requires `route:manage` permission.
Upsert an upstream (provider / model / API key). `apiKey` is written to secret store — only the ref is persisted. Requires `route:manage` permission.
Delete an upstream. Requires `route:manage` permission.
List the difficulty-router tiers (SIMPLE/MEDIUM/COMPLEX/REASONING → modelAlias). Requires `route:manage` permission.
Map a router tier to a model alias → syncs litellm Complexity Router. Requires `route:manage` permission.
List virtual keys, optionally filtered by `userId`. Admin-only.
Issue a new litellm virtual key. The `secret` is returned **once** — never queryable again. Requires `key:manage` permission.
Revoke (terminal) a virtual key. Requires `key:manage` permission.
Rotate the key's secret at the gateway, keeping its governance row/binding. New secret returned ONCE.
Toggle enabled/disabled on a virtual key (distinct from revoke, which is terminal).
Paginated agent list. Admin and read_only see all; user sees only their own (owner scope). Gated `@hasRole(any: [admin, read_only, user])` so all 3 roles can read.
Set agent lifecycle status (`provisioning` / `running` / `stopped` / `exception`).
DESTRUCTIVE: destroys the agent VM, revokes its key, marks it stopped. `confirm` must be true. Owner or admin.
Snapshot the agent's VM (LLD-03 §4). Owner or admin.
List the agent VM's snapshots.
DESTRUCTIVE: revert the agent VM to a snapshot (discards all state since). `confirm` must be true.
List agent configs (智能体配置 page), optionally filtered by `agentType`.
Replace the config's mounted OKF knowledge packs (LLD-11 K2). Set replaced wholesale. Restricted to `admin` only.
Browse the agent template catalog (智能体中心). Any authenticated user can read.
Upsert an agent template (catalog management). Admin-only.
Self-service: any authenticated user creates their own agent (owner = caller). Distinct from `deployAgent` (which provisions a VM from a marketplace OVA).
Create an agent config (智能体配置). Restricted to `admin` only.
Update an agent config. All fields optional.
Delete an agent config.
Mark this config the default for its agent type (unsets others of that type).
Enqueue a credential rotation for the agent's VM (LLD-08); the agent-manager daemon executes it on its next heartbeat. No-op if already in flight. Owner or admin.
Revoke the agent VM's bearer credential — its next heartbeat is rejected (LLD-08 §4.4). Idempotent.
Marketplace OVA template families (智能体市场). Admin-only.
List OVA versions (optionally filtered by family).
Create a family + its initial OVA version in one transaction.
Append a version to an existing family.
Create a NEW agent from a catalog OVA version and provision its VM. Issues the gateway key (returned ONCE in `virtualKeySecret`). Admin-only. Long-running.
List OVA templates in a resource pool's vCenter (powers the deploy form's source picker).
List artifacts (script/config/package/knowledge). Optionally filter by `kind`.
List OKF knowledge packs (LLD-11 K2). Drives the agent-config knowledge picker.
All versions of a named artifact (newest-first).
Upsert an artifact. `content` (≤64K) is embedded for config/script/knowledge kinds; rejected for `kind=package`. sha256 is recomputed from content.
Delete an artifact.
List skills (Skill hub).
Upsert a skill. Admin-only.
Delete a skill. Admin-only.
List Harbor container images.
Upsert a Harbor image. Admin-only.
Delete a Harbor image. Admin-only.
Recent request logs. Requires `audit:view` permission.
Time-bucketed request metrics (summary + buckets). Requires `audit:view`.
Audit log feed. Requires `audit:view`. Filter by `actorUserId`, `actionPrefix` (e.g. `"user."` / `"router."`), or `search` substring.
Aggregated metering for the 计量中心 over a time range. Requires `metering:view`.
Token usage aggregation grouped by model/agent/date (older 计量 summary shape; for the console 计量中心 prefer `MeteringOverview`). Requires `metering:view`.
Raw per-request token usage events (paged). Requires `metering:view`.
Ingest path (gateway usage callback / telemetry). Admin-only (TODO: dedicated service token).
Ingest a single request log row. Admin-only.
